title: Senior Executive, Marketing & Consumer Insights (Fragrance)
description:
about the company
Our client is a global leader in the flavour & fragrance industry, dedicated to creating sensorial experiences that touch the lives of consumers every day. With a strong regional presence in Southeast Asia, their teams collaborate across borders to deliver innovative solutions for the world's most recognized FMCG brands. They pride ourselves on blending scientific precision with creative storytelling to stay ahead of market trends.


about the job

As a Senior Marketing Executive, you will play a dual-impact role, acting as the bridge between regional market intelligence and commercial execution. You will lead the conceptualization and planning of marketing projects across SEA, ensuring our fragrance stories are both differentiated and aligned with customer objectives.

This is a strategic position where you will:

  • Drive Insights: Analyze syndicated market reports and competitive activities to identify high-growth "opportunity spaces" for our clients.
  • Shape Strategy: Translate complex consumer and category data into actionable guidance for fragrance development and submission strategies.
  • Enable Sales: Refine value propositions and develop high-impact presentation decks to improve sales pitches and customer engagement.
  • Lead Communication: Execute branding initiatives, marketing events, and digital communication tools to strengthen our regional presence.


about the manager/team
Reporting to the Director, you will join a high-performing team that operates in a regional, cross-functional environment. The team culture is customer-oriented, collaborative, and disciplined in execution. You will work closely with creative and regional teams to ensure that marketing materials and brand directions are consistent and market-leading.

skills and experience required

  • A Bachelor's degree or Diploma in Marketing, Business, Science, or a related field.
  • Minimum 3-5 years of marketing experience, ideally within B2B fragrance, B2B flavour, ingredients.
  • Proven experience working with market research, consumer insights, or category analysis is essential.
  • Strong ability to manage multiple regional marketing initiatives simultaneously with high attention to detail.
  • Ability to work effectively across regional market.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Florence Pang via LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/florence-pang-14742515a/ or email at florence.pang@randstad.com.sg

(EA: 94C3609/ R25139901)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
